stemHtml: Describe the relationship and commonalities between Regulation (EC) No 300/2008 and ICAO Annex 17...

options.a: Both regulations refer to international civil airports and the purpose is to safeguard them against unlawful interference which would jeopardise their safety.
options.b: Both regulations refer to international civil and military airports and the purpose is to maintain their safety.
options.c: Both regulations refer to general civil airports and the purpose is to protect them against unlawful interference.
options.d: Both regulations refer to facilitation of entry and departure procedures on international airports.
